target_files: new WebSocket transport files; RPC transport files
acceptance: Boost.Beast owns WebSocket upgrade, frame IO, close, and error behavior.

notes: Use the same Asio runtime and RPC method dispatch.

acceptance: Unauthorized WebSocket clients cannot receive notifications or execute protected RPC calls.

notes: Preserve the security fix from upstream issue review.

verification: WebSocketSessionMan keeps authorized Beast sessions as notification recipients and sends JSON-RPC event payloads through RpcWebSocketSession::sendText. Focused recipient filtering test passed.
notes: Do not test incidental frame details.
